industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Biotrend Cevre ve Enerji Yatirimlari Anonim Sirketi
summary: Biotrend Cevre Ve Enerji Yatirimlari Anonim Sirketi engages in the solid waste management and energy production activities in Turkey. It operates biogas and biomass facilities with an installed power capacity of 55,781 MWe. The company was founded in 2017 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
